experiences.title: AI and Software Developer
highlights: Architecting enterprise-grade multi-tenant SaaS platform enabling secure access for multiple organizations with complete data isolation, SSO authentication, and compliance-ready security optimizing response times by 25%.
Engineering high-performance caching solution boosting application speed by 75% and reducing server load by 60%, while integrating AI capabilities and implementing rate limiting to prevent abuse.
Automating deployment pipeline reducing release time by 80%, eliminating manual errors, and ensuring consistent environments from development to production.

Creating comprehensive technical documentation and facilitated bi-weekly stakeholder meetings to translate complex technical decisions into business value and align development with organizational goals.

experiences.title: Web Developer
highlights: Led 5-month software project delivering document management system on schedule, running structured 2-week work cycles with daily team check-ins and weekly client presentations to ensure alignment with business needs, coordinating 5 developers and completing 100+ planned features with zero missed deadlines

Build enterprise document system reducing client's paperwork processing time from 4 hours to 90 minutes, able to handle 500+ monthly document transactions with digital signatures, automatic version tracking, and secure cloud storage serves up to 100+ business users
Assisted in development of a ChatGPT-powered AI chatbot proof of concept into platform via OpenAI API integration.
Architected TypeScript RESTful API with 20+ endpoints and React frontend serving 100+ authenticated users, implementing JWT authentication, role-based access control, and AWS cloud infrastructure.

experiences.title: Bar Attendant
highlights: Train and onboard new staff members across multiple operational areas, developing standardized procedures and documentation that reduce onboarding time by 40% while ensuring consistent service quality and compliance with safety standards
Manage concurrent responsibilities across bar, bistro, and floor operations while providing technical troubleshooting support for POS systems and operational equipment.

Facilitate positive stakeholder experiences through effective communication and conflict resolution, achieving 98% satisfaction while collaborating with management to maintain operational excellence and zero compliance violations
